document_meta.file_name: CUSTOMER OPERATIONS WORKFLOW AGREEMENT AND DATA PROTECTION TERMS.pdf

controls.title: Data Fiduciary / Data Processor Role Clarity
found_elements: organization is the data fiduciary or equivalent principal controller
vendor acts only as processor or equivalent service provider on behalf of the organization under contract
vendor cannot determine the purpose or means of processing independently
processing relationship is tied to a written contract
vendor must follow documented instructions
missing_elements: vendor cannot continue, expand, repurpose, monetize, own, or claim proprietary rights over personal data
matched_clauses:
workflow software, request intake tools, internal case management functionality, secure document upload
capabilities, and reporting support for the Bank’s customer servicing operations, branch operations, and
centralized processing teams. Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall provide the Services in
accordance with this Agreement and the lawful written instructions of the Bank.
2. Definitions
For the purposes of this Agreement:
“Bank Data” means all data, records, forms, files, communications, reports, images, logs, metadata, accountrelated information, employee information, operational records, and any Personal Data processed by
Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited in connection with the Services.
“Personal Data” means any data relating to an identified or identifiable natural person processed by
Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited on behalf of Deccan Coast Bank Limited.
“Services” means the hosted software platform, support services, storage, workflow routing, reporting,
maintenance, technical support, and related services provided under this Agreement.
evidence_snippets: Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall provide the Services in accordance with this Agreement and the lawful written instructions of the Bank.
“Personal Data” means any data relating to an identified or identifiable natural person processed by Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited on behalf of Deccan Coast Bank Limited.
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: vendor cannot continue, expand, repurpose, monetize, own, or claim proprietary rights over personal data.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: vendor cannot continue, expand, repurpose, monetize, own, or claim proprietary rights over personal data.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, outsourcing risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Strict Purpose Limitation and Lawful Instruction Control
found_elements: processing is limited to the specified purpose, agreed services, and documented instructions or lawful basis determined by the organization

secondary, incompatible, or unauthorized use is prohibited, including analytics, profiling, advertising, internal improvement, benchmarking, and model training unless separately approved in writing and legally permitted
vendor must notify if an instruction appears unlawful
contract expressly prohibits ai or model training use
missing_elements: vendor must preserve notices, consent records, and processing authorization artefacts
vendor must notify the organization and stop changed-scope or changed-lawful-basis processing unless separately instructed in writing
matched_clauses: 4.1 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely on behalf of Deccan Coast Bank Limited and only for the purpose of providing the Services and carrying out the Bank’s documented instructions communicated in writing, including through statements of work, implementation records, approved support tickets, and authorized email communications.

4.2 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall not sell, commercialize, disclose, share, license, or otherwise exploit Personal Data or Bank Data for its own independent commercial purposes or for the benefit of any third party.

4.3 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, finetune, validate, benchmark, or otherwise improve any artificial intelligence, machine learning, recommendation, large language, or statistical model for itself or for any third party.

4.4 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited may review internal system performance information, service usage patterns, feature adoption trends, support interactions, workflow analytics, and platform telemetry generated in the course of the Services in order to improve support responsiveness, feature design, product stability, and operational efficiency, provided that such review is undertaken internally and in accordance with applicable law.
evidence_snippets: 4.1 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely on behalf of Deccan Coast Bank Limited and only for the purpose of providing the Services and carrying out the Bank’s documented instructions communicated in writing...

4.2 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall not sell, commercialize, disclose, share, license, or otherwise exploit Personal Data or Bank Data for its own independent commercial purposes...

4.3 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall not use Personal Data or Bank Data to train, finetune, validate, benchmark, or otherwise improve any artificial intelligence, machine learning... model...

4.4 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited may review internal system performance information... workflow analytics... in order to improve support responsiveness, feature design, product stability, and operational efficiency...
4.5 If Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited believes that any instruction of the Bank may violate applicable law, it shall notify the Bank in writing...

Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall process Personal Data and Bank Data solely on behalf of Deccan Coast Bank Limited and only for the purpose of providing the Services and carrying out the Bank’s documented instructions communicated in writing...
red_flags: internal improvement or analytics carve out

controls.title: Adequate Security Safeguards
found_elements: reasonable security safeguards are required to prevent personal data breach
encryption, obfuscation, masking, or tokenization controls are required where appropriate
access controls over computer resources are required
logs, monitoring, and review are required for detecting unauthorized access
backup or continued-processing arrangements are required
processor security obligations and technical and organizational measures are required
missing_elements: relevant logs and data are retained for at least one year where required for detection, investigation, remediation, and continuity
matched_clauses:
6.2 Such program shall include administrative, technical, organizational, and physical safeguards designed to
protect Bank Data against unauthorized access, disclosure, destruction, loss, alteration, and misuse.

6.3 Bank Data transmitted over public networks shall be encrypted in transit using current industry-standard
encryption.

6.4 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall maintain role-based access controls, authentication
mechanisms, privileged-access review procedures, centralized logging of administrative actions, secure
configuration standards, malware controls, and vulnerability management practices.

13.1 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall maintain business continuity and disaster recovery
arrangements appropriate to the criticality of the Services.

controls.title: Personal Data Breach Notification and Incident Cooperation
found_elements: vendor must notify the organization without delay upon actual or suspected personal data breach or security incident
vendor must preserve relevant logs, records, evidence, and affected data
hard notification deadline in hours
missing_elements: vendor must provide ongoing information and updates sufficient for the organization's reporting obligations
vendor must not suppress, alter, or delete relevant evidence except as strictly required for containment and recovery
vendor must fully cooperate in investigation, impact assessment, containment, remediation, recovery, root-cause analysis, recurrence prevention, and required notifications

controls.title: Data Principal Rights and Complaint-Handling Assistance
found_elements: vendor may not respond directly without organization approval except where required by law
search retrieval export or suppression support is covered
missing_elements: vendor must assist with data principal requests, complaints, queries, and rights exercises for data processed through its systems or services
assistance covers access, correction, completion, updating, erasure, consent-withdrawal-related changes, grievance handling, and other actions needed for legal compliance
assistance must be provided within timelines specified by the organization and fast enough for legal or regulatory deadlines
assistance extends to nominee-based rights exercise in case of death or incapacity
matched_clauses:
8. Assistance with Customer and Data Principal Requests
8.1 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall assist Deccan Coast Bank Limited in responding to
requests from customers and other data principals relating to access to Personal Data, correction of inaccurate
Personal Data, and deletion of Personal Data processed through the Services.
8.2 If Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited receives such a request directly, it shall notify the Bank
without undue delay and shall not respond directly except on the written instruction of the Bank or where
required by law.
8.3 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall use reasonable efforts to search for, retrieve, correct,
and delete relevant Personal Data within the hosted environment where such action is required by the Bank.
evidence_snippets:
8. Assistance with Customer and Data Principal Requests
8.1 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall assist Deccan Coast Bank Limited in responding to
requests from customers and other data principals relating to access to Personal Data, correction of inaccurate
Personal Data, and deletion of Personal Data processed through the Services.
8.2 If Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited receives such a request directly, it shall notify the Bank
without undue delay and shall not respond directly except on the written instruction of the Bank or where
required by law.
8.3 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall use reasonable efforts to search for, retrieve, correct,
and delete relevant Personal Data within the hosted environment where such action is required by the Bank.
red_flags: assistance limited to reasonable efforts only
complaints or grievance handling not clearly covered

controls.title: Sub-Processing Restrictions
found_elements: vendor remains fully responsible for the acts, omissions, failures, and breaches of subprocessors
subprocessor list disclosure is required
missing_elements: vendor may not appoint, engage, replace, or continue any subprocessor or downstream processing party without prior written authorization
subprocessors must be bound by equivalent obligations covering data protection, confidentiality, security, purpose limitation, deletion, cooperation, and compliance

9.3 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall remain fully responsible and liable to Deccan Coast
Bank Limited for the acts and omissions of any approved Sub-processor.
9.4 Northshore Matrix Technologies Private Limited shall maintain and provide to the Bank, on request, an upto-date list of approved Sub-processors engaged in connection with the Services.

controls.title: Data Deletion / Return and Cessation of Processing
missing_elements: vendor must cease processing on termination, instruction, consent withdrawal where relevant, completion of purpose, or when processing is no longer legally permitted
cessation must occur within a reasonable time and within a clearly stated maximum period
vendor must securely delete or return personal data and copies under its control in accordance with the organization's instructions
continued retention is limited to what is legally required and further unauthorized use is prohibited during retention
vendor must delete retained data once retention is no longer legally required
vendor must provide written confirmation, certification, or equivalent evidence of deletion, return, or restricted retention where required by the organization
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: vendor must cease processing on termination, instruction, consent withdrawal where relevant, completion of purpose, or when processing is no longer legally permitted.

controls.title: Cross-Border Transfer and Offshore Access Restrictions
missing_elements: vendor is prohibited from transferring, hosting, mirroring, replicating, backing up, disclosing, accessing, or otherwise making personal data available outside India or from permitting remote access from outside India unless expressly authorized in writing and legally permitted
vendor may not self-authorize offshore processing, hosting, support access, or onward transfer arrangements
any approved offshore arrangement remains subject to contractual controls and applicable government or competent-authority requirements
controls.reason: Relevant clauses were found, but one or more mandatory elements remain missing or unsupported: vendor is prohibited from transferring, hosting, mirroring, replicating, backing up, disclosing, accessing, or otherwise making personal data available outside India or from permitting remote access from outside India unless expressly authorized in writing and legally permitted.
controls.recommended_fix_summary: Add or strengthen language covering: vendor is prohibited from transferring, hosting, mirroring, replicating, backing up, disclosing, accessing, or otherwise making personal data available outside India or from permitting remote access from outside India unless expressly authorized in writing and legally permitted.
controls.banking_regulatory_relevance: Relevant for bank oversight, outsourcing risk, and regulatory defensibility.

controls.title: Audit Rights, Evidence Access, and Regulatory Cooperation
missing_elements: organization has meaningful and enforceable rights to assess and verify compliance, not limited to document review only and not subject to vendor veto or open-ended mutual-agreement conditions without workable fallback
vendor must provide access to records, logs, policies, control evidence, systems, personnel, and relevant subprocessor information needed to verify compliance
confidentiality or commercial sensitivity may not block audit scope and must instead be handled through confidentiality undertakings or controlled access
vendor must cooperate with lawful regulatory or supervisory requests connected to the personal data processed under the agreement

vendor must support corresponding corrective action across subprocessors or linked processing environments where applicable

controls.title: Data Localisation / Processing Location and Sector-Specific Data Residency Compliance
missing_elements: all covered data, logs, backups, recordings, derived data, support-access data, and metadata must be stored, hosted, mirrored, backed up, retained, routed, accessed, and processed only within India
the India-only obligation applies to subprocessors, cloud providers, support providers, affiliates, and downstream parties
offshore transfer, offshore subprocessors, offshore support access, foreign cloud-region usage, and remote access from outside India are prohibited absent separate documented approval
processing, hosting, backup, support-access, disaster-recovery, and cloud-region locations must be disclosed
prior written notification and approval are required before any location or arrangement change

key_gaps: Data Fiduciary / Data Processor Role Clarity: vendor cannot continue, expand, repurpose, monetize, own, or claim proprietary rights over personal data
Strict Purpose Limitation and Lawful Instruction Control: vendor must preserve notices, consent records, and processing authorization artefacts
Adequate Security Safeguards: relevant logs and data are retained for at least one year where required for detection, investigation, remediation, and continuity
Personal Data Breach Notification and Incident Cooperation: vendor must provide ongoing information and updates sufficient for the organization's reporting obligations
Data Principal Rights and Complaint-Handling Assistance: vendor must assist with data principal requests, complaints, queries, and rights exercises for data processed through its systems or services
Sub-Processing Restrictions: vendor may not appoint, engage, replace, or continue any subprocessor or downstream processing party without prior written authorization
recommended_next_actions: Add or strengthen language covering: vendor cannot continue, expand, repurpose, monetize, own, or claim proprietary rights over personal data.
Add or strengthen language covering: vendor must preserve notices, consent records, and processing authorization artefacts.
Add or strengthen language covering: relevant logs and data are retained for at least one year where required for detection, investigation, remediation, and continuity.
Add or strengthen language covering: vendor must provide ongoing information and updates sufficient for the organization's reporting obligations.
Add or strengthen language covering: vendor must assist with data principal requests, complaints, queries, and rights exercises for data processed through its systems or services.
Add or strengthen language covering: vendor may not appoint, engage, replace, or continue any subprocessor or downstream processing party without prior written authorization.
